rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Civ. Prac. & Rem. Code §102.001, which merely defines 'Employee' and 'Local government' for purposes of local government liability.
quote:
Sec. 102.001. DEFINITIONS. In this chapter:
(1) "Employee" includes an officer, volunteer, or employee, a former officer, volunteer, or employee, and the estate of an officer, volunteer, or employee or former officer, volunteer, or employee of a local government.
_note: No conflict; rule text is unrelated to property tax or homestead exemptions.
